category_title: Less successful students with low online participation and poor continuity
scenario_title: Low participation and poor continuity in blended course online components
minimal_context: The student is discussing their progress on a Canvas discussion board assignment about weekend plans in a blended Spanish course.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please remember to post a few lines describing your plans for the weekend on the Canvas discussion board, and respond to two or three of your peers' postings.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I haven't posted yet. Because I'm a lower-level language student with limited linguistic resources, it's hard for me to write about my weekend plans in Spanish.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You should try to log in and complete the assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I know I need to, but I lack the discipline and motivation required to succeed in the independent online learning parts of this class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to keep trying to participate.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I haven't logged in for days, so my active participation is really low and I missed the deadline again. I'm just struggling to maintain any continuity in the course.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please remember to post a few lines describing your plans for the weekend on the Canvas discussion board, and respond to two or three of your peers' postings.

STUDENT: I haven't posted yet. Because I'm a lower-level language student with limited linguistic resources, it's hard for me to write about my weekend plans in Spanish.

TUTOR: You should try to log in and complete the assignment.

STUDENT: I know I need to, but I lack the discipline and motivation required to succeed in the independent online learning parts of this class.

TUTOR: You need to keep trying to participate.

STUDENT: I haven't logged in for days, so my active participation is really low and I missed the deadline again. I'm just struggling to maintain any continuity in the course.

task.content: Posting to Canvas discussion boards in Spanish about personal topics (music, weekend plans) and responding to two or three of their peers' postings, as well as maintaining regular engagement (continuity) and meeting submission deadlines for assignments in the Canvas LMS
task.learning_goal: The use of the target language for display purposes rather than to generate rich discussions

context.environment: Blended Spanish course with ubiquitous online components
context.materials: Canvas LMS, online discussion boards, online learning materials
context.social_setting: Online exchanges with peers and independent online learning

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Engaging with online learning materials and maintaining the self-discipline required for a blended course format
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Showed significantly lower levels of participation for all the three derived participation variables; fell below the minimum of 240 and 45 minutes of passive and active participation respectively; fell below 50 days of activity in the course and 75% of on-time submissions
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: May lack the discipline, academic skills and motivation required to succeed in online learning; lower-level language students with limited linguistic resources

behavior_patterns.condition: When required to manage their own learning and submit assignments on time in the LMS
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Low levels of online participation and low grades in the course; lack of continuity
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Lack the discipline, academic skills and motivation required to succeed
